fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the arrears status was recorded

fields.name: sourceSystem
fields.description: The system that originated the data

fields.name: destinationSystem
fields.description: The system that received the message

fields.name: arrears_status
fields.description: Array of arrears status records for each customer

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: Account number associated with the customer

children.name: productType
children.description: Type of product or service for which arrears exist

children.name: arrearsAmount
children.description: Total amount of arrears owed by the customer

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency in which the arrears amount is denominated

children.name: arrearsMonths
children.description: Number of months the customer has been in arrears

children.name: status
children.description: Current status of the arrears (e.g. active, early, no arrears)

children.name: lastPaymentDate
children.description: Date of the last payment made by the customer

children.name: nextPaymentDueDate
children.description: Date when the next payment is due from the customer

children.name: riskLevel
children.description: Risk level associated with the arrears (e.g. high, medium, low)

children.name: actionRequired
children.description: Indicates whether action is required to resolve the arrears

children.name: notes
children.description: Additional notes or comments about the arrears status
